ground_truth.title: Top 39 Electrical Construction Companies in 2025
ground_truth.author: Claire Wilson
ground_truth.main_content:
Electrical construction companies play an important role in residential, commercial, and large-scale industrial construction projects. These firms design, install, test, maintain, and repair electrical systems, including power systems, fire and security systems, telecommunications systems, and electronic control systems. The total electrical construction market is projected to reach $239.1 billion this year. According to the National Electrical Contractors Association (NECA), there are more than 70,000 electrical contracting firms and 650,000 electrical workers in the US.

The 39 companies listed each generate more than $200M in revenue. The top companies include Quanta Services Inc. ($7.7B), MYR Group Inc. ($2.5B), MasTec Inc. ($2.4B), Rosendin Electric ($2.4B), Cupertino Electric, Inc. ($1.6B), IES Holdings Inc. ($1.4B), M.C. Dean ($1.3B), Archkey Solutions ($1.1B), MDU Construction Services Group Inc. ($1.1B), and MMR Group, Inc. ($768M).

Among the fastest growing companies, MasTec showed 171% YOY growth following its acquisition of Infrastructure and Energy Alternatives (IEA). Sargent Electric Company achieved 97% growth over its 100+ year history serving Pittsburgh. Van Ert Electric grew 85% from its Wisconsin roots to nearly 500 employees. ArchKey Solutions expanded 35% with projects across 49 states. IES Holdings demonstrated 34% growth, even maintaining double-digit growth during 2020. Hunt Electric Corp. grew 34% with over 85% of projects coming from repeat customers.

The article concludes that even though these top firms collectively rake in over $31 billion, more than 75% of the industry revenue is generated by companies with fewer than ten employees. Smaller contractors can optimize their resources with the right tools, such as construction billing software that helps ensure timely payments and creates efficiency across accounting teams.
with: Quanta Services Inc. generates $7.7B in revenue, making it the largest electrical construction company on the list.
MasTec showed 171% year-over-year growth, primarily driven by its acquisition of Infrastructure and Energy Alternatives (IEA).
Hatzel & Buehler was founded in 1884, making it one of the first electrical construction companies in the US.
The total electrical construction market is projected to reach $239.1 billion this year.
More than 75% of the industry revenue is generated by companies with fewer than ten employees.
